name: snippet
description: Capture a reusable snippet: generate a complete snippet file (icm metadata block + fenced code + short notes) for the snippets/ layer, grounded in existing entries. Redirect the output to snippets/<group>/<name>.md and run /reindex.
whenToUse: Capture or save a reusable code snippet - produce a ready-to-file snippet (metadata block + code) for the snippets/ layer.
